changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create main table for payment analytics
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS payment_analytics ( event_id String, event_type String, payment_id String, order_id UInt64, user_id String, amount Decimal(18, 2), status Enum8('PENDING' = 1, 'SUCCESS' = 2, 'FAILED' = 3), event_time DateTime64(3, 'UTC'), processed_at DateTime DEFAULT now() ) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_time) ORDER BY (event_time, payment_id);
